{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143237DB001F4197AC5B830641"}"},"total":310},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7499270799003501337","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔生动形象细腻，运用各种角度来描写故事及人物，第一人称，第三人称，心理描写，动作描写，情绪描写，非常厉害，还有很多人物关系，夫妻，父女，朋友，上下级，无不让人唏嘘不已，真的很现实，很好看的悬疑推理犯罪类型的书，入股不亏[送心]","text_exts":[{"e":99,"s":95,"text":"悬疑推理","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740747575B830641%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227499270799003501337%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227472681063928581145%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746067496,"group_id":"7472681063928581145","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"越清醒越痛苦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N93NIj8855Leige+CrfPDnr3DOsw9T6wBQv7X/3GJ15d","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/78b840df6ef446edb7c4be1772afc98b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615314&x-signature=GkbvH1TMIW%2Bv3DfuL%2F0QnkTZM%2BE%3D","user_id":"4204978407221143","user_name":"油炸小蝴蝶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4204978407221143","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7472681063928581145","book_info":{"abstract":"【两代刑警，师徒三人，共破谜案，探寻真相。】
留守儿童之殇，空巢老人之困，未成年人的罪与罚……老刑警的智谋与经验、铁拳刑警的锋芒与坚韧、新生代刑警的热血与机敏，两代刑警、师徒三人在一桩又一桩谜案中抽丝剥茧，用真相撕裂黑暗，守护人心至暗处那缕不灭的光。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/00e3c9e528e8bccba21a44b48b56397c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"空城","author_id":"","book_id":"7472681063928581145","book_name":"重案三人组","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"57.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599876898428046361","read_count":"18464","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"477390"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"126","tags":"悬疑灵异,精品小说,悬疑推理,悬疑,推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/00e3c9e528e8bccba21a44b48b56397c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258757&x-signature=pHyhyXgVW2EHtmu1frCURCzrmQg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"123"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143237DB001F4197AC5B830641"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9646,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30821,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9394},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7512668918396863294","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体很好，就挑一个小毛病吧，罗宋对妻子有点过于婆婆妈妈，对案件又很有直觉和铁血，这两种性格出现在一个人身上有些违和，其中罗颓废的时间和描写有些过长，不仅没有烘托气氛推进主线，反而有点令人不适冲淡主题。但总体来说还是非常好的书，期待续集！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749186805,"group_id":"7472681063928581145","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxCiDgQOSsuFadlJggsi4W/uY9yZZOMkEaVcclrmJUXS","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5e3f5cda7d6749fe89af04d4388556d0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617930&x-signature=EnZqUI9V25nJ%2BwbCLfMJg3dLTLQ%3D","user_id":"1185699906197532","user_name":"禁锢的角落"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1185699906197532","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7472681063928581145","book_info":{"abstract":"【两代刑警，师徒三人，共破谜案，探寻真相。】
